title: カイチョーとダジャレ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio and I are on our way back home from
shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't that Prez over there in the bookstore?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what book she's looking for? Knowing
Prez, it must be something amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like a manual on how to run even faster. Or how
to be an emperor!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna buy whatever she buys!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can say anything, she dashes off to greet
Symboli Rudolf, who has just finished paying for
her book.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio. Fancy seeing you here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Prez, what book did ya buy? Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh this? It's "Become the King of Puns! 100 of the
Punniest Puns!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You didn't hear it? The punniest pu—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No, I heard you the first time! Wh-what a pick!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you're that interested in it, I'll lend it to you
after I'm done. I'm sure it has much to teach you,
too.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then, until next we meet.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Puns, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Puns, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
B-buy it? Y-yes! Of course! I'd never go back on
my word!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Maybe puns are the key to getting stronger!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Time to study up on puns! Then, I'll be one step
closer to becoming like Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, Prez! You run fast as the wind, but does that ever make you winded?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I suppose so, but exertion is merely the
evidence of how much one has labored.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Come on! I was making a pun! Wind and winded!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see. I understand now. However, I feel a better
pun here would be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unexpectedly difficult to come up with a pun
that will make Symboli Rudolf laugh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm sure this experience will help Tokai
Teio to grow in some way.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Buying a book on puns isn't really gonna
help me become more like Prez.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, let's head back then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was surprising to see Rudolf go out of her way
to buy a book about puns, but the incident soon
fades from my memory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As students of the esteemed Tracen Academy, we
must strive to do our utmost both on the track
and in the classroom.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In doing so, we will be on track to achieving our goals.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Prez is as cool as ever! She delivers such
wonderful speeches! ♪
choice_data_list: Did she just slip a pun in there?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No way! There's no way she'd put a pun in such an
amazing speech!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: "We must strive to do our utmost both on the track and in the classroom. In doing so, we will be on track to achieving our goals."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Where's the pun in that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Wait.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she realizes, the shock renders Tokai Teio
speechless for a while.
